_readme: Test cases for skill-bacon-creator v1.1. Each case traces to a recorded observation or experiment. Replace example entries with real session data before Phase 6.
skill: (replace with skill niche — e.g. 'fetch jazz playlists from Spotify')
generated_at: (ISO timestamp — filled by handler.ts at Skill Foundry)
completion_rule: All test cases with status 'needs_live_validation' must be resolved before deploy.sh runs. No case may remain 'empty'.

test_cases._comment: EXAMPLE — happy path. Replace with real observation data.
test_cases.actual: (paste real result from observations.md — truncated at 500 chars)

test_cases._comment: EXAMPLE — edge case / failure path. Every test suite must have at least one.

input.query: (paste exact query that triggered the edge case)

expected.behaviour: auth wall — fallback to search_web should trigger

test_cases._comment: EXAMPLE — experiment variant. One entry per experiment in experiments.md.

input.query: (paste exact command or URL from experiments.md)

test_cases._comment: EXAMPLE — rate limit probe. Required if 429 was observed.

expected.behaviour: back off 2s, retry once — per Rule 3

status_legend.needs_live_validation: Populated from observation data but not yet re-validated against live environment
status_legend.validated: Re-run against live environment and confirmed
status_legend.blocked: Cannot validate — dependency missing (e.g. API token not available)

result_legend.pass: Actual output matches expected shape and status code
result_legend.fail: Actual output does not match — see notes
result_legend.partial: Some fields matched, others missing or unexpected — see notes
